steps.title: Find where the line crosses
steps.content: The $y$-intercept is where the graph crosses the $y$-axis. At that point, the $x$-coordinate is $0$.

steps.title: Read the intercept point
steps.content: From the graph, the line crosses the $y$-axis at $y=-7$, so the intercept is $(0,-7)$. The answer is D.
